subcodes.first_line: This is the sphere of His Command, by which the celestial vault doth revolve, and this is a truth that hath been inscribed in the Mother Book by the Pen of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا دائره الامر یدور به فلک السما و هذا حق قد کان فی ام الکتاب من قلم الله
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @da'iras and haykals, @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality
